item.title: What Happened Today #43
item.description: Turning planes around. Erasing scientists. Seizing sacred land. Trump isn’t just making moves—he’s rewriting the rules. A judge halts mid-air deportations. A haunting video exposes Khalil’s arrest. Norms vanish: Fauci erased, monuments threatened, the Kennedy Center put under his thumb. Even law firms aren’t safe. ⚡ Stay informed. Stay engaged. ? Subscribe free → govbrief.today ? Share this. Post it. Keep the spotlight on. #GovBriefToday #Resist2025 1. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/government-shutdown-vote-senate-gop-measure/ 2. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c05mvr3j3yro 3. https://abcnews.go.com/International/wireStory/hamas-release-american-israeli-hostage-truce-agreement-implemented-119825933 4. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/15/trump-deportation-lawsuit-00232121 5. https://apnews.com/video/attorneys-for-mahmoud-khalil-release-video-of-his-arrest-4b05368c85c2418aa04d0d1e1155798d 6. https://www.desertsun.com/story/news/environment/2025/03/15/is-trump-trying-to-eliminate-chuckwalla-sattitla-national-monuments/82456163007/ 7. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/a-mural-of-anthony-fauci-was-meant-to-inspire-staff-then-nih-took-it-down/ar-AA1AYsDt 8. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/15/arts/music/trump-kennedy-center-honors.html 9. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/15/trump-executive-order-paul-weiss-law-firm/82445507007/ 10. https://thehill.com/business/5197164-hundreds-protest-tesla-showrooms-over-musks-doge-work/

item.title: There is a 0% chance Canadians want to become Americans.
item.description: Don't believe random internet posts. Do your own research. Then come back with your own research why you believe Canada should become the 51st state. I will wait here patiently and then tell you to fuck off. :-) And to fuck off a bit more after that.

item.title: Some Programming Humor For A Niche Audience (BLESSED I.T. SUNDAY) #117
item.description:
1_WhatIsThisCreature
2_WhenYouTellAsianDadThatYouWIllNotBeAProgammer
3_WriteThisDown
4_GoodThingTheyWrappedTheCablesInNiceCircularObjectsOtherwiseItCouldHaveBeenAMess
5
6_FoundInTheWild
7_WebsitesTheseDays
8_LeastToxicProductManager
9
10_WhatIsHolePics
11
12_GuysWeShouldStartOurOwnTechStartUp
13_ITSupportInOtherSItuations_part_1
14_ITSupportInOtherSItuations_part_2
15. It do be like that. My favorite moment is when a player asked me how much I get in funding and I just told the truth: "What funding? I just exploit myself for cheap labor" :D But anyway, thank you for making it to the end of the dump, if you like my style of humor and dumps, please consider wishlisting my game Do Not Press The Button (Or You'll Delete The Multiverse). Currently working on the release date announcement trailer (Boyyyy it's coming soooon!) Thank you for considering this and for being part of this journey. I couldn’t do this without you. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have an amazing SUNDAY!

item.title: In 1988,Israel Kamakawiwo'ole called the recording studio at 3 a.m. and said he had to record a song right away. 15 minutes later, Israel arrived at the studio. The studio owner, Milan Bertosa said, "And in walks the largest human being
item.description: In 1988, Israel Kamakawiwo'ole called the recording studio at 3 a.m. and said he had to record a song right away. 15 minutes later, Israel arrived at the studio. The studio owner, Milan Bertosa said, "And in walks the largest human being I had seen in my life." A security guard gave the 500-pound man a large steel chair to sit on. Milan said, "Then I put up some microphones, do a quick sound check, roll tape, and the first thing he does is 'Somewhere Over the Rainbow.' He played and sang, one take, and it was over." Today, Israel Kamakawiwo'ole's version, is the most requested one of this classic song. credit go to owner You must read this: https://golfvertex.com/israel-kamakawiwoole-the-epic-story-of-the-hawaiian-singers-iconic-cover/
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: John Cleese has something completely different to say
item.description: Peter Quin posted this here: https://www.instagram.com/p/DHMC4pYPo5e/ I believe Peter Quin is a graphic artist who created this. I don't know if he did it alone or had some assistance... and if the John Cleese footage was recorded for this, or taken from some other existing media. But whatever the case, it's immensely creative. Enjoy!
item.dc:creator: cytherians
OopsIMeanToFartButAPoopCameOut

item.title: yeehaw
item.dc:creator: wowthisisntfunny

item.title: Oh Dam...
item.description: From 2019: https://x.com/marcorubio/status/1105081215261069312 -- Hey Imgur, I need your help. Right now, I’m facing the harsh reality of having nowhere to stay for the next two weeks. It’s overwhelming, but I’m doing everything I can to keep pushing forward with hope. The social insurance payments were meant to kick in, but have been delayed - meaning I haven't eaten for about 4 days now. Last week, I battled a nasty chest infection—so bad that a health center had to keep me for a couple of days. I’m beyond grateful they helped me recover because, honestly, I don’t know how I would’ve made it through alone. But now, I’m in a tough spot again. I need a little extra support to get through this next stretch. If you can spare even a small donation, it would mean the world to me. Every bit helps—whether it’s covering a safe place to sleep, a meal, or just getting through another day. If you can contribute, please check out my bio or DM me. Or, if you prefer, you can donate directly through Ko-Fi here: www.ko-fi.com/skeebeedeebop77 I can’t put into words how much your kindness and generosity mean to me. Thank you for being here, for caring, and for any help you can give. Much love, and be excellent to each other. ❤️ EDIT: It's so easy to point the finger, scream "scammer" and say "well, I just don't believe your story" even after I've tried to explain it. Here is a post I made a while back: https://imgur.com/gallery/TvcLpI4 Yes, I've been homeless for a few months. Far longer than I've been OK with, and more than I ever thought I would be. I'm educated. I'm smart. I'm a hard worker. I HATE BEGGING and my pride has taken more hits than I can count. I'm shit down on my luck and just waiting to bounce back. I'm not a liar. I'm not a cheat, and I'm not a scammer. I have no issue with explaining my story and I understand I'm the one asking for help but I just ask for some kindness instead of some of the abuse I've been getting by DMs. You know who you are.
item.dc:creator: Skeebeedeebop

item.title: Memes For My Boi
item.dc:creator: MsSpicyBrain

item.title: What a roller coaster of a day.
item.description:
Dad's surgery was earlier this week. He is back home. Mom had to go to the ER. Found that out a couple hours today before I was to teach a class in my role as community organizer. That was fun.
Found that out after the class was over on both counts. Thrilled for my friend - he was having a hard time without that money, and it isn't much. But he won. He has a brain injury, and the government is saying he can still be a software developer. The judge disagreed. Full benefits for my brother from another mother.
Yeah. First drink in a while. I already feel good. I won't drink too much, I promise. I don't like hangovers.
This is really the only good news otherwise at the moment. None of this will cost them a cent. Hell, I've spent more money driving Dad to surgeries than they have spent. Tricare for life is amazing, and one of the many things our government has taken from veterans. Taxing corporations more would not have to raise prices but for their greed. Billionaires could be taxed 90% above a certain amount and still live like gods. that money could fund universal healthcare for every single one of you. My parents would be destitute by now without that earned coverage from 21 years in and a tour in Vietnam that exposed Dad to Agent Orange. If you care, you can read about his Bronze Star citation here. It's been a few years, so I may have to repost it. Be good y'all. https://old.reddit.com/r/MilitaryStories/comments/m2ssws/veteran_ubikerjedis_dad_earns_a_bronze_star_with/
item.dc:creator: Loctavius

item.title: Not a political post.
